title: ALPN (Application-Layer Protocol Negotiation)
description: Explain the role of ALPN in negotiating application layer protocols during the TLS handshake. Describe how browsers and servers use ALPN to select HTTP versions like HTTP/2 and HTTP/3. Analyze the impact of ALPN on protocol upgrade paths and connection efficiency.
objectives: Explain the role of ALPN in negotiating application layer protocols during the TLS handshake.
Describe how browsers and servers use ALPN to select HTTP versions like HTTP/2 and HTTP/3.
Analyze the impact of ALPN on protocol upgrade paths and connection efficiency.
